nasb.text: He was the lamp that was burning and was shining and you were willing to rejoice for a while in his light.

esv.text: He was a burning and shining lamp, and you were willing to rejoice for a while in his light.

cnv.text: 約翰是一盞點亮的燈，你們情願暫時在他的光中歡樂。

ccb.text: 约翰是一盏点亮的明灯，你们情愿暂时享受他的光。

csbs.text: 约翰是一盏燃烧发光的灯，你们情愿在他的光里快乐一时。
